C

CalendarActivity - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Calendar screen for students showing appointments on a selected date.
CalendarActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.CalendarActivity
 
cancelAppointment(String, String, AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Cancels an appointment by setting its status to CANCELLED and restoring the linked slot's availability so another student can book it.
CAREER_GUIDANCE - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
Career guidance counseling specialization.
clearAll() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Call on logout to wipe everything.
com.example.moogerscouncil - package com.example.moogerscouncil
 
Counselor - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Represents a counselor profile in the BetterCAPS system.
Counselor() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
COUNSELOR - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRole
Role assigned to counselors providing services.
CounselorAdapter - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
RecyclerView adapter for the counselor directory list.

Creates a new adapter.
CounselorAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
ViewHolder for a single counselor card.

Dashboard for logged-in counselors.

Displays a searchable, filterable directory of all counselors.

CounselorRepository - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Repository for the Firestore 'counselors' collection.
CounselorRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'counselors' collection.
CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for operations that return a single counselor.
CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for operations that return a list of counselors.
CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for write operations (update / set).
createUser(Student, UserRepository.OnUserCreatedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository
Creates a new user document in Firestore under users/{uid}.
